comment: NEW BEST 7134.40. kokinnwakashuu 7125.30 base + 22 EXACT-AUDITED closed-form overlays (18 prior + 4 new: 191/379/204/324). The 4 new were code-audited provably-exact (191 ~94k differential cases, 379 756k, 204 10k adversarial, 324 6k). local +9.10 over base -> LB +9.10 (7125.30->7134.40): FIFTH ~1:1 confirmation. KEY FINDING: the historically-'dead' task191 overlay was MISATTRIBUTED -- it is provably exact (touches-all-4-edges invariant makes the suspected off-grid leak structurally impossible); the old -0.23 was a bundled batch of 8, never isolated to 191. BUILD-FROM-SCRATCH batch this session: 6 bloated low-score targets -> 0 new wins, 4 NO_GO (158/243/367/198 = walls or memory-floored). LESSON: bloated low-score public base nets are bloated because the task is HARD (info-theoretic wall or near memory-floor), NOT because they are easy golf targets; the public base is near-optimal where tasks are solvable. The cheap EXACT wins were all EXISTING custom solvers not yet overlaid (16 total: the 12 + 191/379/204/324). Remaining gains require genuinely NEW algorithms (7800-tier original work) or a newer public base. Silver ~7150 needs +15.6 more.
pending_submit: CONFIRMED 7134.40 (+9.10 over 7125.30 base; +0.63 over prior 7133.77; +10.97 over session-start 7123.43)
